purpose: Curated TS MCP and GOCLMCP parity mappings that cannot be inferred mechanically; generated SDK paths come only from the codegen receipt.

overrides.reason: GOCLMCP reports use report-family names instead of generic operation verbs.
GOCLMCP reports use report-family names instead of generic operation verbs.
Expense reports use a reports-family Go MCP tool; generated SDK reachability and naming come from the receipt/disposition artifacts.
GOCLMCP reports use report-family names instead of generic operation verbs.
GOCLMCP reports use report-family names instead of generic operation verbs.
GOCLMCP keeps audit logs plural in the tool name.
Clockify invoice info search is a filtered list, not the plain invoice list tool.
GOCLMCP groups invoice item operations under invoices_items.
Import time/expenses into an existing invoice; both surfaces expose it under invoices_import_time.
GOCLMCP groups invoice item operations under invoices_items.
GOCLMCP groups invoice payment operations under invoices_payments.
GOCLMCP groups invoice payment operations under invoices_payments.
GOCLMCP groups invoice payment operations under invoices_payments.
Category tools live under the expenses_categories prefix.
Category tools live under the expenses_categories prefix.
Category tools live under the expenses_categories prefix.
Category tools live under the expenses_categories prefix.
The TS MCP has an archive helper; GOCLMCP models archive under update/delete style category operations.
TS MCP names the status transition explicitly; GOCLMCP exposes a generic request update tool plus approve/deny helpers.
TS MCP names the status transition explicitly; GOCLMCP exposes a generic request update tool plus approve/deny helpers.
The generated balances update is exposed under the established time_off_balances group with explicit replacement-value semantics and stored-preview confirmation.
TS MCP uses member terminology; GOCLMCP uses user terminology.
TS MCP uses member terminology; GOCLMCP uses user terminology.
Project totals POST is the existing per-project assignments list tool; GOCLMCP names it as a scheduling aggregate.
GOCLMCP names capacity totals as the capacity workflow.
Deferred on TS: POST /scheduling/assignments/users/totals returns HTTP 404 (route not bound) on the live API; shipping a tool would 404. See spec/evidence/discrepancies.md.
The literal project-membership backlog uses membership-first public naming for the generated typed PATCH operation.
The dedicated /projects/{id}/archive route returns 404 on the live API; projects are archived via the project update tool (archived:true). See spec/evidence/discrepancies.md.
POST /time-entries is the workflow-first create exposed as clockify_entries_log.
GOCLMCP exposes workspace users through the users_list tool.
Member profile lookup; TS names it member_profile_get, GOCLMCP users_profile.
PATCH member-profile is surfaced as the member_profile_update tool (the singular member_profile prefix matches member_profile_get; not the dead PUT alias).
Adding a user to the workspace is surfaced under the users group as the invite tool.
Grant a workspace role to a user; GOCLMCP groups role writes under users_role.
Revoke a workspace role from a user; GOCLMCP groups role writes under users_role.
Workspace membership activation and deactivation are surfaced under the users group as one reversible, privileged status tool.
The TS MCP exposes the status/latest-log endpoint as a bounded, redacted delivery-diagnosis workflow rather than the generated operationId phrase.
